dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires confirmation that price closes lower than the previous day to detect a downward reversal. Entry condition: close < prev_close (current day closes lower than previous day). Exit condition set as reversal logic: close > prev_close (price closes higher, indicating reversal of the short thesis). The 93% success rate mentioned in source is documented but not encoded as a hard constraint. Stop loss and hold_days_max set conservatively given the confirmation-based nature of this pattern.

source_rule_text: Closing price confirmation reversal: Wait for price to close lower the next day to detect a reversal
